summary: Antonelli's Friday pace puts Mercedes firmly in contention against McLaren's Piastri in what shapes as a tight two-team battle at the Red Bull Ring. The extreme heat declared as a race hazard this weekend will demand precision tire management and pit-stop strategy, potentially reshuffling grid positions on race day. A strong result here could prove decisive for either Mercedes or McLaren in their championship push, with every point crucial as the season intensifies.
